extra.message: User input from 'username' parameter is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string via Jinja2.from_string('Welcome ' + username + '!'). This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI). An attacker can inject Jinja2 template expressions (e.g., {{ 7*7 }}, {{ config }}, or RCE payloads like {{ ''.__class__.__mro__[1].__subclasses__() }}) which will be evaluated server-side, enabling arbitrary code execution.

cwe: CWE-1336: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Template Engine
